banner.greeting: Hello, I'm Elena, and I'm a
banner.description: I specialize in building responsive, user-friendly web applications with React/Node/Redux. I enjoy creating clean code, intuitive interfaces, and modern designs. I am eager to contribute my skills to a professional team and grow as a developer through new challenges and exciting projects.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.description: Here are some of the projects I’ve built using React, Redux, Node, APIs and modern front-end tools.

idiomFlow.title: IdiomFlow
idiomFlow.description: A Full-stack React app for mastering English idioms, featuring Auth0 authentication, a personalized user dashboard, gamified quizzes, and a global leaderboard.

recipeApp.title: Recipe App
recipeApp.description: React web app for searching recipes by keywords (ingredients or dish name) using the Edamam Recipe API.

nutritionApp.title: Nutrition Analysis App
nutritionApp.description: The app uses the Edamam Recipe API and displays a list of recipes with calories, images, and ingredients.

mealPlan.title: Weekly Meal Plan Ideas
mealPlan.description: The app allows users to create, update, and manage weekly meal plans with ingredients. An example of building an interactive, user-friendly interface with real-world use cases.

feniks.title: Speech therapy center FENIKS
feniks.description: A responsive, modern landing page for a speech therapy center.

phrasalVerb.title: Phrasal Verb Trainer
phrasalVerb.description: Interactive, fully responsive web application for learning and practicing English phrasal verbs.

psychologist.title: Psychologist Landing Page
psychologist.description: Ready, fully functional, responsive Psychologist Landing Page.

clothingStore.title: Online Clothing Store
clothingStore.description: An online clothing store with category filtering (Dresses, Pants, Skirts, Shoes, Shirts).

skills.title: Technical Expertise
skills.subtitle: Passionate Web Developer & Tech Creator.
skills.description: With a focus on building scalable full-stack applications...

points: Contributed to UI/UX design and built a design system that cut layout time by 50%.
Implemented Feature-Sliced Design (FSD) architecture for modular, scalable code.
Designed business logic, including component structure and state management.
Built a content management service on the MERN stack with Redux.
Optimized styles with SASS/SCSS to improve CSS structure and maintainability.
Ensured mobile and cross-browser compatibility across devices.
